_comment: Maps subject-line keywords to SharePoint destinations. Edit this file to add new jobs — no code change needed. 'library' must be one of the keys in config.filing.libraries (currently 'ACTIVE JOBS' or 'Active Quotes'). 'folder' MUST EXACTLY match an existing SharePoint folder name in that library — Graph PUT silently creates missing folders along the path, so a typo creates a misnamed orphan. Matching is case-insensitive and uses word boundaries — 'Baldivis' matches 'Baldivis pour notes' but not 'Baldivising'. Longest keyword wins on conflict.

Power On.folder: Kings Head Substation - Power On Cabling

Wattle Grove Fuel.folder: Wattle Grove Fuel Station - Burton Construction
